title: OSS license allowlist + per-version exemptions
description: Committed configuration for the license-allowlist CI gate (FR-014, FR-015, FR-016, FR-017). The maintainer edits this file to expand the accepted license set or to grant a one-off exemption for a specific name@version with written justification.

items.description: An SPDX license identifier from https://spdx.org/licenses/.

allowedLicenses.description: SPDX identifiers that pass the gate. The default set (MIT, BSD-2-Clause, BSD-3-Clause, Apache-2.0, ISC, MPL-2.0, 0BSD, Unlicense, CC0-1.0) is the standard permissive set.

exemptions.description: Per-name@version overrides of the allowlist. Each entry is matched only when the dependency record's name AND version match exactly — never wildcard, never name-only.

version.description: Exact dependency version. An exemption pinned to one version does NOT cover another version of the same package — that prevents supply-chain attacks via version bumps.

license.description: The SPDX identifier or expression this exemption is approving (so the file is self-documenting at code-review time).

justification.description: Why this dependency is acceptable despite being outside the allowlist. Free-form, but must be substantive (≥ 20 chars). Suggested form: audit date, scope of risk, approver.
